command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('src/combat/observability.rs')
text = p.read_text()
text = text.replace('battery_loop::{BatteryLoopBlockedReason, BatteryLoopSignal, BatteryLoopTransition, BatteryLoopState},',
                    'battery_loop::{BatteryLoopBlockedReason, BatteryLoopSignal, BatteryLoopState, BatteryLoopStep, BatteryLoopTransition},')
text = text.replace('blueprints::{dorumon::{PredatorLoopSnapshot, PredatorLoopState, PredatorLoopSignal, PredatorLoopTransition}, patamon::HolySupportSnapshot, twin_core::{TwinCoreSignal, TwinCoreTransition}},',
                    'blueprints::{dorumon::{PredatorLoopSnapshot, PredatorLoopState, PredatorLoopSignal, PredatorLoopStep, PredatorLoopTransition}, patamon::HolySupportSnapshot, twin_core::{TwinCoreSignal, TwinCoreTransition}},')
text = text.replace('fn format_predator_loop_step(step: crate::combat::kernel::PredatorLoopStep) -> String {',
                    'fn format_predator_loop_step(step: PredatorLoopStep) -> String {')
text = text.replace('crate::combat::kernel::PredatorLoopStep::', 'PredatorLoopStep::')
text = text.replace('fn format_battery_loop_step(step: super::kernel::BatteryLoopStep) -> String {',
                    'fn format_battery_loop_step(step: BatteryLoopStep) -> String {')
text = text.replace('super::kernel::BatteryLoopStep::', 'BatteryLoopStep::')
p.write_text(text)
print('updated observability refs')
PY
